name: Sonim Technologies, Inc.
description: Sonim Technologies, Inc. is a provider of ultra-rugged mobility solutions specifically engineered for task workers operating in demanding, hazardous, and extreme environments. The company's comprehensive portfolio includes durable mobile phones, industrial-grade hotspots, and specialized accessories designed to withstand harsh conditions. By focusing on rugged reliability and performance, Sonim creates essential communication tools that ensure connectivity and safety for professionals in sectors such as public safety, construction, energy, and manufacturing. Recently acquired by NEXA, Sonim continues to advance the next generation of rugged enterprise mobility solutions to support those who face challenging work environments daily.
